channel.title: Fastest Way to Lose Weight on PepsFeeder
channel.description: Recent content in Fastest Way to Lose Weight on PepsFeeder

item.title: Intermittent fasting advantages and the right method for you
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: Intermittent fasting or part-time fasting is not only the ideal introduction to ketosis, but it also has several advantages for your performance and performance. You can find out about the effects of skipping a meal every now and then and which method you can use to start intermittent fasting.
